name: Mitesco, Inc.
summary: PART I Company Overview Mitesco, Inc. (the Company, we, us, or our) was formed in the state of Delaware on January 18, 2012. On December 9, 2015, we restructured our operations and acquired Newco4pharmacy, LLC, a development stage company which sought to acquire compounding pharmacy businesses. As a part of the restructuring, we shut down our former business line. On April 24, 2020, we changed our name to Mitesco, Inc. In October 2023, the Company changed its domicile from Delaware to Nevada in ...
